name: Pasta Ala Oglio with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cloves of minced garlic (or 1 teaspoon preminced garlic)
1 cup cooked pasta of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small sauté pan, heat the margarine over medium-low heat. Add the minced garlic (or preminced garlic) and cook until fragrant and slightly golden, about 2-3 minutes.
2. Once the garlic is tender and has not browned, add the dill, parsley, basil, salt, pepper, and parmesan cheese to taste. Stir to combine.
3. Add the cooked shrimp to the pan and gently toss everything together until well combined.
4. Stir in the cooked pasta and continue tossing until evenly coated with the sauce. Transfer the mixture to a warm serving plate.
5. Adjust seasoning with additional salt and pepper if needed, and serve immediately.
